response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with ~13-15 years of broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators). However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and executive-level influence with strategic customers. The resume shows no deep AI/ML background, no published AI products, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no evidence of director-level strategic influence or large-scale platform leadership. The seniority and AI-specialization gap is significant.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, teaching, public talks)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at platform scale
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope — titles cap at Staff/Senior
No advanced degree or recognized thought leadership in AI
